title: SwordandShieldLinkHylian
description: Hylian Sword and Shield of The Legend of Zelda .
body:
# Add Hylian Sword and Shield 
## The Legend of Zelda 
If u want have Knight/Soldier Botw/Totk Armor ? :

Zelda set / Zelda Sword :

7 Boomerangs of BOTW (Datapack) :

All are here :[https://modrinth.com/collection/2bygpraQ](https://modrinth.com/collection/2bygpraQ)

![Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c2a60e7ecd84b65db83a972f0e62a04c041eb0c.png)
![Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/419b5138f2a6736e7f60bc8d8bc5d5ec873c35a2.png)

<details>

![View1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4568b17b2444c81dd2a0539442ff820a99b803ce.png)
![View2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4b79a37491f69f252dfdbb32cdd2cf3e5085f41.png)

# **How to make on head with command :**

_/item replace entity Name armor.head from entity Name weapon_

## **Or give :**

_/give @p diamond_sword[equippable={slot:"head"}]_


# Thanks for downloading !
